hooks.command: MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null); SWIFT_COUNT=$(echo "$MODIFIED" | grep -c '\.swift$'); MD_COUNT=$(echo "$MODIFIED" | grep -cE 'CLAUDE\.md|AGENTS\.md'); if [ "$SWIFT_COUNT" -gt 0 ] && [ "$MD_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then printf '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Swift files changed but CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md were not updated. Update both before committing."}'; else printf '{}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking docs are up to date...
